description: THE single canonical topic vocabulary for the TechZeph portfolio. src/data/topics.ts reads this file to GENERATE the /topics and /topics/[topic] landing pages. Slugs here are post-slugify (lowercase, non-alphanumerics collapsed to single hyphens, trimmed) and post-alias (already canonical). Edit this file to add/rename topics; do not duplicate the slugify logic or the alias map anywhere else. (The Layer-1 topic DETECTOR rules that used to live here under `detectors` are tooling and now live in a separate repo; only the registry + config are needed to render.)

notes.slugify: Mirrors slugify() in scripts/sync-github-projects.mjs: value.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,'-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g,''). topics.ts re-implements this identically; keep both in sync.
notes.titleize: Mirrors titleize() in scripts/sync-github-projects.mjs: value.replace(/[-_]+/g,' ').replace(/\b\w/g, l => l.toUpperCase()). Used as the display-name fallback when a topic has no explicit title here.
notes.kind: language | framework | infra | domain | practice | meta. Used for the group facet on the /topics directory page.
notes.groups: Facet labels for the /topics directory page. A topic whose kind has no group label falls back to config.defaultGroup ('other').
notes.minProjects: Global threshold: an aggregated topic needs at least this many distinct projects to get its own page. Per-topic 'minProjects' overrides this.
